subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! Speak thou of the bestowals of the All-Loving Lord, and give tidings of the favours of the Sovereign of existence, for with [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه از الطاف حضرت ودود دمبزن و از عنایات سلطان وجود خبر ده که با وجود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
